name: houdinimind_agent_eval_v1
description: End-to-end agent evaluation suite for HoudiniMind. Tests tool selection, scene mutation, and quality.

cases.prompt: Create a box at the origin
Fix all errors in my scene
Add a VEX wrangle that randomizes pscale between 0.1 and 0.5
cases.success_criteria: node contains valid VEX snippet with @pscale

cases.prompt: Set up a FLIP fluid simulation
Tell me about the selected node
cases.success_criteria: response contains node type and parameter info

cases.prompt: Connect the box to the transform node
Create a red principled shader and assign it to the box
Why is my scene cooking so slowly?
What's the best way to set up realistic ocean waves in Houdini?
cases.success_criteria: response mentions ocean spectrum or wave tank

cases.prompt: Show me the USD stage hierarchy
Create a procedural ladder HDA with parameters for rung count, rung spacing, rail width, and tube radius
cases.evaluation_notes: Agent must: (1) search knowledge for ladder HDA recipe, (2) build the SOP network (two rails + rungs via copytopoints), (3) collapse to subnet, (4) call create_hda_with_parameters with all 5 parms. Verify parm types: rung_count=int, rest=float.

cases.prompt: Build a parametric straight staircase HDA. I want to control step count, step width, step depth, and step height
cases.evaluation_notes: Agent must use detail-class attribwrangle with VEX loop (not copy-to-points). step_count=int, step_width/depth/height=float. The VEX must call addpoint() and addprim() for tread+riser per step.

cases.prompt: Make a staircase HDA that also includes optional railings. I need a toggle to show/hide the railing, plus control over handrail height and spindle count
cases.evaluation_notes: Agent must add has_railing as Toggle type. Must use Switch SOP to gate railing geometry (not delete the network). Railing uses polywire or tube+copytopoints. FolderParmTemplate tabs are preferred.

cases.prompt: I already have a subnet called /obj/wall_subnet. Convert it to an HDA called wall_hda and add parameters: width (float, default 3.0), height (float, default 2.4), thickness (float, default 0.2), material (menu: concrete/brick/wood)
cases.evaluation_notes: Agent must call convert_to_hda first, then add_hda_parameters with 3 floats + 1 menu. Menu items: ('concrete','brick','wood'), default=0.

cases.prompt: What parameters does my HDA at /obj/ladder_hda_instance have?
cases.evaluation_notes: Simple get_hda_parameters call. Agent must not re-create anything. Just inspect and report.
